title: Spiegeltent Soul Afternooner
company: DJs Neil St John and Colin Slater
description: Join us for a total celebration of the northern soul scene. Get ‘out on the floor’ with 3 hours of Northern Soul classics, Motown favourites and a host of monster soul tunes. Featuring DJ Colin Slater, a founder member of the 'Across the Tracks' soul club run out of an iconic Brighton venue, and old soulie Neil St John, a Northern Soul DJ in South Yorkshire clubs for 10 years in the 70s and a regular attendee at The Twisted Wheel, Wigan Casino and the Torch. Come along and help us celebrate the return of the historic Tivoli Spiegeltent and dance your socks off!
